props.title: Complete Component Showcase with Data Visualization
props.subtitle: Explore all 28+ available components in an organized, paginated interface

props.content:
## Tab 1: Overview & Introduction

Welcome to the comprehensive component showcase! This demonstration page includes **all available components** organized across 16 navigable tabs.

### Key Features:
- ✅ Complete component library coverage
- ✅ Real working implementations
- ✅ Mobile-responsive design
- ✅ Professional examples and use cases
- ✅ New data visualization components (Charts & Diagrams)

### Getting Started

Use the **sidebar navigation** on the left to jump to any section, or scroll through each tab to explore all components.

**Component Categories:**
1. **Layout Components** - Card, Grid, Sidebar
2. **UI Components** - Badge, Button
3. **Data Display** - Metric, Stat, ProfileHeader, CapabilityList
4. **Content** - Header, List, Markdown
5. **Interactive** - TodoList, DataTable, Form, Tabs, Checklist, Calendar, SwipeCard
6. **Media** - PhotoGrid
7. **Timeline** - Timeline, GanttChart
8. **Data Visualization** - LineChart, BarChart, PieChart, Mermaid

## Tab 2: Text & Typography

Demonstration of heading hierarchy, text formatting, code blocks, and lists.

# Heading Level 1 - Main Page Title
## Heading Level 2 - Major Sections
### Heading Level 3 - Subsections
#### Heading Level 4 - Minor Sections
##### Heading Level 5 - Detail Headers
###### Heading Level 6 - Smallest Headers

---

### Paragraph Formatting

This is a **bold statement** that emphasizes important information. You can also use *italic text* for subtle emphasis. For inline code references, use `backticks` like this: `const variable = 'value';`.

> "Blockquotes are perfect for highlighting important quotes or key takeaways from documentation."
>
> — Component Showcase Author

### Code Blocks with Syntax Highlighting

**JavaScript Example:**
```javascript
const pageBuilder = {
  name: 'Page Builder Agent',
  version: '3.0',
  components: ['Card', 'Grid', 'Sidebar', 'Tabs'],
  capabilities: {
    create: true,
    validate: true,
    render: true
  },
  
  buildPage(spec) {
    console.log('Building page:', spec.title);
    return this.validateComponents(spec.components);
  }
};
```

**Python Example:**
```python
class ComponentValidator:
    def __init__(self, schemas):
        self.schemas = schemas
        self.errors = []
    
    def validate(self, component):
        """Validate component against schema"""
        schema = self.schemas.get(component['type'])
        if not schema:
            self.errors.append(f"Unknown type: {component['type']}")
            return False
        return True
```

**SQL Example:**
```sql
SELECT 
  agent_id,
  page_id,
  title,
  created_at,
  COUNT(*) as component_count
FROM agent_pages
WHERE status = 'published'
GROUP BY agent_id, page_id, title, created_at
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
```

### Lists and Organization

**Unordered List:**
- First major point
- Second major point
  - Nested sub-point A
  - Nested sub-point B
    - Deeply nested item
- Third major point
- Fourth major point

**Ordered List:**
1. Initial setup and configuration
2. Design component structure
3. Implement validation logic
4. Test component rendering
5. Deploy to production
6. Monitor performance metrics

**Mixed List:**
1. **Phase 1: Planning**
   - Define requirements
   - Create specifications
   - Review with stakeholders
2. **Phase 2: Development**
   - Build components
   - Write tests
   - Code review
3. **Phase 3: Deployment**
   - Staging environment
   - Production rollout
   - Monitoring setup

## Tab 7: Data Visualization - Diagrams

Mermaid diagrams for system architecture, workflows, and data models.

### System Architecture Flowchart

props.chart:
graph TD
  A[User Request] --> B[API Gateway]
  B --> C[Load Balancer]
  C --> D[Service Layer]
  D --> E[Database]
  D --> F[Cache]
  F --> E
  D --> G[Message Queue]
  G --> H[Workers]

sequenceDiagram
  participant Client
  participant API
  participant Auth
  participant Database
  Client->>API: POST /login
  API->>Auth: Verify credentials
  Auth->>Database: Check user
  Database-->>Auth: User data
  Auth-->>API: JWT token
  API-->>Client: 200 OK + token

classDiagram
  class User {
    +String id
    +String name
    +String email
    +login()
    +logout()
  }
  class Post {
    +String id
    +String title
    +String content
    +publish()
  }
  class Comment {
    +String id
    +String text
    +Date created
  }
  User "1" --> "*" Post
  Post "1" --> "*" Comment
  User "1" --> "*" Comment

tabs.label: Documentation
tabs.content:
# Documentation

## Component Library

All components are fully documented with:
- Required and optional fields
- Schema validation rules
- Usage examples
- Best practices
- Common mistakes to avoid

tabs.label: API Reference
tabs.content:
# API Reference

## Endpoints

- `POST /api/agent-pages/:agentId/pages` - Create new page
- `GET /api/agent-pages/:agentId/pages/:pageId` - Get page
- `PUT /api/agent-pages/:agentId/pages/:pageId` - Update page
- `DELETE /api/agent-pages/:agentId/pages/:pageId` - Delete page

tabs.label: Examples
tabs.content:

Check out the various component examples throughout this showcase page. Each tab demonstrates different use cases and patterns.

## Tab 12: Social & Interactive

Swipeable cards and social engagement components.

### Feature Showcase Cards

cards.title: Dynamic Page Generation
cards.description: Create beautiful, responsive pages from JSON specifications with real-time validation and security checks.

cards.title: Component Validation
cards.description: Automatic schema validation ensures all components meet security and accessibility standards.

cards.title: Real-time Updates
cards.description: WebSocket integration provides instant page updates without manual refresh.

cards.title: Mobile-First Design
cards.description: All components are optimized for mobile devices with responsive layouts and touch interactions.

cards.title: Accessibility Built-in
cards.description: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance is standard across all components with screen reader support.

cards.title: Data Visualization
cards.description: Powerful charts and diagrams for presenting complex data in visual formats.

cards.title: Template System
cards.description: Reusable templates for common page types speed up development and ensure consistency.

cards.title: Cross-Agent Integration
cards.description: Seamless integration with all agents in the ecosystem for coordinated page building.

## Showcase Complete

You've explored all 16 tabs showcasing the complete component library. Use the sidebar navigation to revisit any section.
